raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX American Express for Unresolved Fraudulent Charge Dispute To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to lodge a formal complaint against American Express regarding their handling of a fraudulent charge on my account. The charge is : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX : {$970.00} Date : XX/XX/year> I have not made or authorized this fraudulent charge in any shape or form and I do not recognize it. 

Despite my repeated requests for investigation and resolution, American Express has failed to dispute or credit the unauthorized charge, leaving me liable for a transaction I do not recognize and did not authorize. 

This failure to act constitutes a breach of their duty to protect customers from fraud, and their dismissive and aggressive approach has been unacceptable. This is a clear violation of the Fair Credit Billing Acts amendments to the Truth in Lending Act, 15 U.S.C. 1666-1666b, 12 C.F.R. 226.13. See also 12 C.F.R. 226.12 ( b ) .I seek the CFPB 's assistance in resolving this matter and holding American Express accountable for their obligations. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 




Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
